news.t: BMO Launches +/- 3X MAX™ Airlines Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: JETU is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are United Airlines Holdings stock at 10.07%, American Airlines Group at 9.79%, GE Aerospace at 9.48%, Delta Air Lines at 9.33%, and RTX Corporation at 8.40%.

overview.description: The MAX Airlines 3X Leveraged ETNs (JETU) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the Prime Airlines index. The fund tracks 3x the daily price movements of an index consisting of US-listed companies in the air transportation industry, these include airlines, air freight and logistics, and aircraft and parts manufacturing. The index is selected and weighted by market cap JETU was launched on Jun 23, 2023 and is issued by Max.

data.title: BMO Launches +/- 3X MAX™ Airlines Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca
data.text: NEW YORK , June 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ - BMO today announced the launch of MAX™ Exchange Traded Notes ("ETNs"). MAX™ offers sophisticated investors efficient, tactical leveraged exposure to stocks in s...
